analytical_provenance: Three independently scoped external reviews: surface mapping, CRONOS chain review, and adversarial reachability/hostile-input analysis.

findings.description: The JSON bundle boundary requires reachability and input-control evidence before any defect claim.
findings.induction: No executed induction; not a confirmed defect.

findings.description: Observed CRONOS persistence and chain operations require end-to-end failure-path execution before any integrity defect claim.
findings.induction: No executed induction; not a confirmed defect.

findings.description: Hostile path and malformed-JSON candidates lack proven external control, reachable mechanism, and successful package-context execution.
findings.induction: Native package-context attempt was not executable (ModuleNotFoundError: corvus.models); not a confirmed defect.

abstentions: No external candidate was promoted without executed induction.
The external analysis does not establish exploitability, reachability, or a confirmed defect.
